articles.title: Seema Sajdeh reacts to getting back with Sohail Khan after divorce
articles.description: Reality star and entrepreneur Seema Sajdeh has finally reacted to the buzz surrounding her recent appearance with former husband Sohail Khan at a wedding in Pune. The sighting sparked speculation on social media, with many wondering if the former couple was considering getting back together. Seema dismissed the assumptions and explained that her relationship with Sohail is rooted in family, co-parenting and the bond they share through their children.

articles.title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time is getting a full remake on Nintendo Switch 2
articles.description: Nintendo has confirmed a full remake of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time for Nintendo Switch 2, revealed at the end of the June 2026 Direct. The teaser trailer showed almost nothing beyond a sleeping Link and a logo drop, but confirmed a more grounded, realistic art style—a departure from recent Zelda games. No release date yet, though Nintendo has the game slated for sometime in 2026.

articles.title: Tejasswi Prakash Birthday: 'ऐसे ही चमकती रहो...', करण कुंद्रा ने मंगेतर तेजस्वी प्रकाश पर लुटाया प्यार, एक्ट्रेस के बर्थडे पर शेयर की रोमांटिक तस्वीरें
articles.description:
छोटे पर्दे की जानी-मानी एक्ट्रेस तेजस्वी प्रकाश 33 साल की हो गई हैं. वो 10 जून को अपना बर्थडे सेलिब्रेट कर रही हैं. इस खास मौके पर टीवी सेलेब्स और फैंस लगातार उन्हें बधाइयां दे रहे हैं. वहीं, अब तेजस्वी प्रकाश के मंगेतर और टीवी एक्टर करण कुंद्रा ने रोमांटिक अंदाज में उन्हें बर्थडे विश किया है.

'मुझे तुम्हारा "मैन" होने पर गर्व है'
करण कुंद्रा ने इंस्टाग्राम पर कुछ रोमांटिक तस्वीरें शेयर की हैं, जिसमें वो अपनी मंगेतर तेजस्वी प्रकाश के साथ नजर आ रहे हैं. दोनों की केमिस्ट्री ने फैंस का दिल जीत लिया है. करण ने तेजस्वी पर प्यार लुटाते हुए कैप्शन में लिखा, 'सबसे निडर और सबसे खास छोटी बच्ची को जन्मदिन की बधाई... मुझे तुम्हारा 'मैन' होने पर गर्व है. ऐसे ही चमकती रहो.'

View this post on Instagram

A post shared by Karan Kundrra (@kkundrra)

ये भी पढ़ें:-Pati Patni Aur Woh Do BO Day 4:आयुष्मान खुराना की 'पति पत्नी और वो दो' मंडे टेस्ट में पास हुई या फेल? जानें- चौथे दिन का कलेक्शन

कैसा है करण कुंद्रा और तेजस्वी प्रकाश का लुक?
तस्वीरों में तेजस्वी का स्टाइलिश अंदाज देखने को मिल रहा है. उन्होंने ब्लैक फ्लोर-लेंथ ड्रेस पहनी है, जिसमें फ्लोरल एम्ब्रॉयडरी और शीयर डिटेलिंग दी गई है. ड्रेस का टॉप कॉर्सेट स्टाइल में है, जो फिगर को बहुत स्टाइलिश तरीके से हाईलाइट कर रहा है. दुपट्टा-स्टाइल ड्रेपिंग उनके लुक को और भी एलीगेंट बना रही है. वहीं, करण ने ब्लैक टक्सीडो स्टाइल आउटफिट कैरी किया है, जिसमें वेलवेट जैकेट और फॉर्मल शर्ट का कॉम्बिनेशन उनके लुक को क्लासिक और रिफाइंड बना रहा है.

करण कुंद्रा और तेजस्वी प्रकाश ने की सगाई
बता दें कि बीते महीने करण कुंद्रा ने नेटफलिक्स के शो 'देसी बलिंग' में तेजस्वी प्रकाश को शादी के लिए प्रपोज किया था. करण ने तेजस्वी को बड़ी-सी डायमंड की अंगूठी पहनाई थी. अब फैंस इस कपल की शादी का बेसब्री से इंतजार कर रहे हैं. बता दें करण कुंद्रा और तेजस्वी प्रकाश इन दिनों टीवी रियलिटी शो 'लाफ्टर चेफ्स 3' में नजर आ रहे हैं.

ये भी पढ़ें:-कौन थीं कुमुद, जिनकी मौत से टूटे सलमान खान, अर्पिता और सोहेल सहित पूरा परिवार गम में डूबा

articles.title: Siddhanth Kapoor: Never wanted to be a quintessential Bollywood hero
articles.description: Actor Siddhanth Kapoor is successfully balancing his careers as an actor, DJ, and professional poker player, a path he finds exhilarating. He recently appeared in 'Mandala Murders' and prefers an unconventional, artistic approach to his acting career, shunning the typical Bollywood hero mold. Kapoor remains unfazed by external judgments and comparisons, prioritizing his peace of mind.

articles.title: Ilaiyaraaja struggles for words after Bharathiraja's demise
articles.description: Legendary composer Ilaiyaraaja expressed profound grief following the passing of his lifelong friend and collaborator, director Bharathiraja. Their partnership, which began in obscurity and blossomed into a series of timeless Tamil cinema classics, has been deeply impacted by this loss. Ilaiyaraaja, visibly moved, paid his respects, acknowledging the irreplaceable void left by the celebrated "Iyakkunar Imayam."

articles.title: Ariana Grande stays focused on fans and tour after Ethan Slater split
articles.description: Pop sensation Ariana Grande is channeling her energy into her 'Eternal Sunshine Tour' following a reported amicable split from actor Ethan Slater. The singer, who recently kicked off her first tour since 2019, is reportedly "incredibly focused" on delivering a spectacular show for her dedicated fans. This marks a significant return to the stage for Grande after years away.

articles.title: ‘He believed in me before anyone else did’: Ashwini Nambiar mourns loss of her mentor Bharathirajaa
articles.description: Actor Ashwini Nambiar paid an emotional tribute to Bharathirajaa, recalling how the acclaimed filmmaker gave her first break in Pudhu Nellu Pudhu Naathu. She said his vision, mentorship and impact on Indian cinema will endure.

articles.title: Ready actress Eva Grover alleges abuse in marriage from Aamir Khan's stepbrother Hyder Ali Khan: 'He was physically violent'
articles.description: Actress Eva Grover has revealed that she eloped with Aamir Khan’s stepbrother, Hyder Ali Khan, and married him after dating for just 18 days despite her mother’s objections. Reflecting on the marriage, Eva alleged that it later turned abusive, prompting her to leave with the support of her family, colleagues, and late filmmaker Tahir Hussain.

articles.title: Shalini Kapoor: I often get typecast for characters which are elegant, rich, and commanding
articles.description: Actress Shalini Kapoor Sagar, celebrated for her diverse roles, expresses deep affection for every character she's embodied. While acknowledging typecasting, she credits digital platforms for enabling her to explore complex, grey-shaded roles.

articles.description: Kevin Jonas has shared a hilarious behind-the-scenes story from Nick Jonas and Priyanka Chopra’s first date. The singer revealed that he was such a dedicated wingman that he ended up vomiting in the bathroom.

articles.title: Bharathiraja: How a man from Theni became a famous name in cinema
articles.description: Renowned Tamil filmmaker Bharathiraja, born Chinnasaamy Periyamayathevar, passed away, leaving a void in the industry. Celebrated for his unique portrayal of village life and human emotions, his journey from Theni to cinematic icon is inspiring. His directorial milestones like '16 Vayathinile' redefined Tamil cinema. Despite personal tragedy, his legacy endures.

articles.description: Tamil cinema mourns the passing of legendary filmmaker Bharathiraja. Chief Minister M.K. Stalin paid his respects, joining industry stalwarts who lauded his groundbreaking work. Bharathiraja, celebrated for his realistic portrayal of rural Tamil Nadu, leaves behind a rich cinematic legacy that inspired generations of filmmakers and actors.

articles.title: 'We trusted the local doctor too much': Anju Aravind opens up about aunt's demise
articles.description: Actress Anju Aravind mourns the loss of her influential aunt, Raj Aunty, who was a mother figure and instrumental in her confidence, education, and career. Anju revealed financial struggles during her dance training, with her aunt providing her first costume. She also highlighted a devastating delayed cancer diagnosis, urging for prompt medical evaluation.

articles.title: Bharathiraja cause of death: Veteran Tamil actor-filmmaker dies at 84
articles.description: Veteran filmmaker and actor Bharathiraja, a pivotal figure in Tamil cinema, has passed away at 84 in Chennai. Revered for bringing rural life and raw emotions to the screen, his directorial debut in 1977 marked a turning point. Bharathiraja's legacy includes nearly 40 films and a profound influence on storytelling and actors. Read on!

articles.title: Bharathiraja Death Reason: How did the legendary Tamil filmmaker die at 84? Check here
articles.description: Bharathiraja death news: Renowned Tamil filmmaker Bharathiraja has passed away at the age of 84. He was known for his realistic portrayal of rural life and for introducing new talent. Bharathiraja had been unwell for months, facing breathing difficulties and lung infections. His health had been fragile following the recent passing of his son. He leaves behind a significant legacy in Indian cinema.

articles.title: 'The Godfather Part III' star Anthony Guidera passes away at 65 following complications from a cardiac arrest
articles.description: Veteran actor Anthony Guidera, known for his roles in 'The Godfather Part III,' 'Species,' and 'Baywatch,' has passed away at 65. He died on June 6 following complications from a cardiac arrest in May. Guidera's extensive career spanned numerous film and television projects, leaving behind a notable legacy in Hollywood. His wife confirmed the heartbreaking news.

articles.title: A Star's Visit And Viral Reels: Why Are Thousands Of Karnataka Devotees Suddenly Heading To This Kerala Temple?

articles.title: Watch: Maha Natti folk dance by 300 women at Shimla Summer Festival
articles.description: A vibrant performance of the traditional Maha Natti folk dance by 300 women captivated audiences at the Shimla Summer Festival, showcasing Himachal Pradesh’s rich cultural heritage. Dressed in colorful attire, the participants celebrated local traditions through synchronized movements, highlighting the region’s enduring folk art and festive spirit.

articles.title: Janhvi Kapoor in talks for creature horror movie with Tumbbad director Rahi Anil Barve: Report
articles.description: Janhvi Kapoor is reportedly in advanced talks to star in a high-concept creature horror film directed by Rahi Anil Barve, the filmmaker behind the acclaimed horror-fantasy Tumbbad. The project is said to feature the actress in a never-seen-before role that will require extensive preparation and acting workshops.

articles.title: US Senator hails Modi as India's longest-serving elected Prime Minister
articles.description: US Senator John Cornyn and singer Mary Millben congratulated PM Narendra Modi on becoming India's longest-serving elected PM. Cornyn praised Modi's transformational tenure, while Millben called it a 'historic democratic milestone' for India.

articles.title: Anupama Parameswaran reveals how Sai Pallavi helped her discover painting during her toughest phase in 2021
articles.description: Actress Anupama Parameswaran unveiled a hidden talent for painting, revealing that she created a collection of artworks during a challenging period in 2021. She credits fellow actress Sai Pallavi for introducing her to this artistic outlet. Her parents' thoughtful gesture of framing and displaying these paintings added another layer of sentiment to her creative journey.
